title: Bare Bones - 3D Tools
description: Giving more equipment the trident treatment!
body:
This pack adds 3D models for all tools and weapons. The models are designed to look like the original 2D sprites.

The 3D models are visible on the ground and in the players hand, but remain the 2D sprite in the inventory and item frames. 

---

No mods are required. [_Entity Model Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitymodelfeatures) (or Optifine) is optional for the trident.

This pack works with Hold My Items.

If you want to use this with enchantment outlines, download this [addon pack.](https://modrinth.com/project/enchantment-outline-x-bare-bones-3d-tools)

---

This pack is still under development, more tools will be added in the future.  
Please see changelog for up to date images.

### Completed Tools

v 1.0
- Sword  
- Pickaxe  
- Axe  
- Shovel  
- Hoe   

v 1.1
- Trident  

v 1.2   
- Spear

v 1.3
- Bow
- Crossbow


### Future updates

- Mace  
- Fishing Rod  
- Brush
(and possibly more...)

---
